> @@ -54,6 +54,22 @@

^^^ update motification date please

>  kernel to access
>  .Tn tmpfs
>  file systems.
> +.Sh OPTIONS
> +The following options are available when
> +mounting
> +.Nm
> +file systems:
> +.Bl -tag -width indent
> +.It Cm gid
> +root group id
> +.It Cm uid
> +root user id
> +.It Cm mode
> +permessions in octal format
   ^^ permissions
> +.It Cm inodes
> +maximum number of inodes
> +.It Cm size
> +maximum size (in bytes) for the file system
>  .Sh EXAMPLES
>  To mount a
>  .Nm
> --- tmpfs.5.diff ends here ---
